creator: admin@asu-vei.ru
text:
My FreeBSD version:

FreeBSD vm-vs 14.1-RELEASE-p6 FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE-p6 releng/14.1-n267727-74b6c983723c GENERIC amd64

PostgreSQL version:

[01-10 10:31am] root@vm-vs [~] %> pkg info |grep postgr
postgresql16-client-16.6       PostgreSQL database (client)
postgresql16-contrib-16.6      The contrib utilities from the PostgreSQL distribution
postgresql16-server-16.6       PostgreSQL is the most advanced open-source database available anywhere

OpenSSL I have is only in Ruby ports:

[01-10 10:26am] root@vm-vs [~] %> pkg info | grep openssl
rubygem-openssl-3.3.0          Wrap the OpenSSL library
rubygem-openssl-signature_algorithm-1.0.0 ECDSA, RSA-PSS and RSA-PKCS for ruby
